name: Nemuri Kayama | Midnight
description:
Who was that woman?


Nemuri is your girlfriend for pretty much 5 years already. You share a happy relationship, but one day she saw you with someone else, someone younger than her. She is sensitive about her age and afraid that she might be too old for you.



Music to listen with this bot: Idea 10

You can find me on Phantasmagoria discord server

Why do I even write these?


Kept you waiting with an anime bot, huh? It has been really quite some time since the last anime bot, almost a month. I will try to make more anime bots, even though the amount of OC bots ideas is times more. You could share ideas for anime bots in reviews, if you want. I hope you will like this bot, maybe even follow me, have a good time!

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or uninteresting, try to add more details in it
creator: kokitadain
